overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The player moves from a sidewalk vendor past crowds of pedestrians with umbrellas, gazes up at towering holographic advertisements, and continues through a wet intersection with elevated walkways and futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk food vendor area adjacent to pedestrian crossing

events.description: camera moves from sidewalk onto the yellow striped crosswalk
leaving the vendor stall area and entering the open street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past the food vendor and stepping onto the yellow crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting under colorful red and blue umbrella at food cart
woman with red hair and black jacket standing at the vendor stall

entered.detail: street food stall with red and blue umbrella and green containers
silver metal railing along the sidewalk edge
bright yellow striped pedestrian crossing with red WAIT text
rain-slicked pavement with red and gray coloring

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a food vendor cart with a colorful umbrella on a wet cyberpunk sidewalk. The camera holder walks forward past the vendor and steps onto a bright yellow crosswalk, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to the open street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian crosswalk with neon advertising

events.description: passing through a dense group of pedestrians carrying colorful umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking through the crosswalk alongside crowds of pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians carrying yellow and blue umbrellas walking ahead
pedestrian in orange pants and white tank top crossing the street

entered.detail: large glowing advertisement screen on futuristic building facade
red and blue illuminated pedestrian bridge spanning the street
tall dark building with illuminated windows and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Walking through the wide intersection surrounded by crowds carrying umbrellas. Neon digital billboards glow on the right while an elevated red walkway spans the distance ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as pedestrians move in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon of skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to gaze at the massive holographic displays and neon signs on the buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrians with umbrellas looking up at the towering advertisements

entered.detail: massive building covered in animated digital billboards and neon signage
illuminated cyan neon signage reading BELOW DECK
art deco style curved glass and metal subway entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a canyon of towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signs. The BELOW DECK sign glows prominently as animated faces display on the building facades. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk below the dizzying array of digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with elevated highway and subway entrance

events.description: futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet street
slowing pace while approaching the busy intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing through the intersection while observing the elevated structures and traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the wet intersection
woman in black dress and high heels walking ahead

entered.detail: green-tinted curved glass entrance to the underground metro station
building facade covered in multiple glowing advertisement screens

segments.scene_description: Walking toward a complex intersection featuring an elevated highway overpass and a curved glass subway entrance. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet roads while digital billboards illuminate the left side. The camera slows as it approaches the crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with traffic and elevated walkways

events.description: white vintage-style compact car drives past the camera
camera stops at the curb to observe the intersection traffic

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection corner watching vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: man in military-style jacket and cap standing at the curb
white compact car driving through the crosswalk area

entered.detail: futuristic blue and white public seating on the sidewalk
tall pole with traffic signals and street lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera stopping at a street corner to observe traffic. A white compact car drives past while a man in military attire stands nearby. The elevated walkway structure dominates the center view, and futuristic blue benches line the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a crowded sidewalk into a vast, neon-drenched urban intersection that culminates in a dizzying view of a futuristic skyline. It begins beside a food vendor cart with a colorful umbrella on a wet sidewalk, moving forward to step onto a bright yellow crosswalk. As the camera enters the wide intersection, the environment opens up to reveal crowds of pedestrians with umbrellas and glowing digital billboards reflecting off the damp asphalt. The scene then shifts focus toward an elevated red walkway spanning the distance before the camera tilts upward to reveal a canyon of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the view expands to encompass massive holographic advertisements and animated faces on building facades, with the glowing BELOW DECK sign dominating the neon-lit sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban intersection that transitions from a steady walk into a stationary observation of the city's traffic. It begins by advancing toward a complex crossing characterized by a curved glass subway entrance and a towering elevated highway overpass, with digital billboards casting a glow over the wet roads. As the camera slows its approach to the crossing area, the surrounding architecture of the overpass becomes more prominent against the neon-lit environment. The scene then shifts to a complete stop at a street corner, where the view opens up to reveal futuristic blue benches lining the sidewalk and a man in military attire standing nearby. Finally, the perspective lingers on the bustling street as a white compact car drives past beneath the dominating structure of the elevated walkway.
